title: Cheiranthus forrestii
taxonomy: Cheiranthus forrestii is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It is a type of cress, which is a genus of plants commonly known as wallflowers. The classification of Cheiranthus forrestii places it in the kingdom Plantae, with further classification as follows: kingdom - Plantae, family - Brassicaceae, genus - Cheiranthus, species - C. forrestii. This species is part of the larger order Brassicales and is also classified as a flowering plant within the clade angiosperms. Further research may be necessary to confirm the exact classification and relationships of Cheiranthus forrestii.

This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects that may help alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as provide relief from skin irritations and wounds.
